title: Em's Options
description: Em’s Options is a lightweight Fabric modpack that boosts FPS, sharpens vanilla-style visuals, and adds PvP-focused HUD improvements for smoother, more competitive gameplay.
body:
## 🎮 Em’s Options – Fabric Modpack

Em’s Options is a carefully put-together Fabric Modpack that includes many of the mods I personally use every day to make Minecraft look better, run smoother, and feel more optimized for PvP.

This pack focuses on performance, visuals, and combat improvements, giving you an enhanced vanilla experience while keeping things lightweight and stable.

I’m always open to suggestions and feedback through the Discord server, where you can also get support by creating a ticket. I usually respond within 1–3 days.

---

### ⚔️ PvP Mods
- Useful additions to give you an edge in combat.
- Includes Armor HUD and a Saturation Display for better fight awareness.

### 🕐 Performance Mods
- Tweaked for smooth, consistent FPS on most setups.
- Includes top-tier optimizers like Sodium, Lithium, and several others for better rendering and world performance.
- Expect me to update or swap out performance mods over time to keep improving stability.

### 🧱 Visual & Texture Mods
- Subtle improvements that keep the vanilla feel while making the world more immersive.
- Features Connected Textures, Better Grass, Improved Glass, and other small aesthetic upgrades(Newest update doesn't support this yet).

---

💬 Need help or have a suggestion?
[Join the Discord server](https://discord.gg/6es9CcWtzm) to submit your ideas or create a support ticket.
I appreciate all feedback — every bit helps make this pack better!

---

✨ Optimized. Beautiful. PvP-ready. That’s Em’s Options.

---
